purpose: Sparse public corpus that simulates messy client uploads for Exergy Analyst development.

items.why_it_matters: Real district-heating substation telemetry with heat delivery and temperature fields.
expected_agent_tasks: flag missing comfort and hydraulic context
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: Rawer SCADA-style district-heating data for ingestion robustness tests.
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: Table of high-temperature heat-pump demonstrator test days and experiment metadata.
expected_agent_tasks: recommend which test day to analyze first
items.license_note: Zenodo open dataset; check record metadata before redistribution.

items.why_it_matters: Scanned test protocol for a high-temperature heat-pump experiment.
expected_agent_tasks: separate planned vs observed test conditions
items.license_note: Zenodo open dataset; check record metadata before redistribution.

items.why_it_matters: Piping and instrumentation diagram for the heat-pump demonstrator.
expected_agent_tasks: map sensor names to CSV columns
items.license_note: Zenodo open dataset; check record metadata before redistribution.

items.why_it_matters: Public industrial heat/emissions/temperature workbook across energy-intensive subsectors.
expected_agent_tasks: rank sectors and facilities by heat temperature bands
items.license_note: Public CAELP download; retain attribution and avoid assuming open-source license beyond public access.

items.why_it_matters: Methodology and findings deck for interpreting HEATset workbook fields.
items.license_note: Public CAELP download; retain attribution.

items.why_it_matters: Sample from a large unit-level industrial energy/emissions dataset.
expected_agent_tasks: join data dictionary and estimate useful screening fields
items.license_note: Open Energy Data Initiative file; this corpus stores a small sample for development.

items.why_it_matters: Data dictionary for FIED fields.
expected_agent_tasks: audit required data for a client question
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: Heat-pump model database derived from public Heat Pump KEYMARK data.
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository; check upstream license and Heat Pump KEYMARK source constraints.

items.why_it_matters: Manufacturer-specific performance curve file with messy naming and operating points.
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository; check upstream license and source constraints.

items.why_it_matters: Heat-pump COP model parameters for energy-system modeling.
expected_agent_tasks: connect weather and sink temperatures to COP
items.license_note: MIT-licensed code repository per publication; retain attribution.

items.why_it_matters: Daily heat-demand profile factors used in open heat-demand modeling.
items.license_note: MIT-licensed code repository per publication; retain attribution.

items.why_it_matters: NREL ATB-derived LCOE test data for project diligence and cost benchmarking.
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: Capital-cost assumptions paired with ATB LCOE data.
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: Macro-enabled H2A hydrogen production model workbook for TEA-style ingestion tests.
expected_agent_tasks: identify drivers and missing finance context
items.license_note: Public NREL/NLR-hosted model; retain attribution and do not modify original workbook silently.

items.why_it_matters: OpenStudio building model file for CAD/BEM-style parsing and context extraction.
expected_agent_tasks: connect model assumptions to energy analysis
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: EnergyPlus HVAC dataset for equipment/performance-model parsing.
expected_agent_tasks: map IDF objects to business-readable assumptions
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: Environmental consequences chapter from a DOE/NETL energy-project EIS.
expected_agent_tasks: connect environmental claims to project diligence
items.license_note: Public DOE/NETL document.

items.why_it_matters: Single-engine slice of the NASA C-MAPSS turbofan degradation benchmark with operating settings and sensor channels.
expected_agent_tasks: infer sensor meanings from messy headers
estimate degradation trend and remaining useful life signals
separate simulation benchmark confidence from real fleet confidence
items.license_note: MIT-licensed Hugging Face dataset derived from NASA C-MAPSS; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: Hourly sensor data from a gas turbine for CO and NOx emissions analysis.
expected_agent_tasks: unpack and profile multi-year CSV files
model emissions against load and ambient conditions
identify variables needed for regulatory-quality emissions claims
items.license_note: UCI Machine Learning Repository dataset; retain citation and license metadata.

items.why_it_matters: Large PV module specification library with manufacturer, electrical, and physical fields.
expected_agent_tasks: rank module options by power density and constraints
flag missing warranty, degradation, and bankability context
items.license_note: Public NREL SAM repository; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: Converted NASA lithium-ion discharge-cycle data with voltage, current, temperature, and capacity fields.
expected_agent_tasks: estimate capacity fade from partial fields
warn when lab-cell behavior is overextended to EV packs
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository derived from NASA Li-ion Battery Aging Datasets; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: Wind turbine SCADA file with generated power, wind speed, theoretical curve, and wind direction.
expected_agent_tasks: separate turbine health signals from wind-resource effects
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository; dataset provenance points to a public wind SCADA source.

items.why_it_matters: PEM fuel-cell activation test data with impedance columns and applied-voltage metadata.
expected_agent_tasks: connect curve shape to likely operating condition changes
identify missing MEA, humidity, and calibration context
items.license_note: CC-BY-4.0 GitHub dataset; cite upstream authors.

items.why_it_matters: Companion metadata file for the PEM activation test CSV.
expected_agent_tasks: join metadata to raw electrochemical data
extract test conditions and instrument context
detect mismatches between file names and tabular columns
items.license_note: CC-BY-4.0 GitHub dataset; cite upstream authors.

items.why_it_matters: City-level EV charging metadata for Amsterdam from a global charging-demand dataset.
expected_agent_tasks: interpret charger counts and city scope
join static metadata to high-dimensional charging volume tables
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository associated with an open Scientific Data dataset; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: Wide EV charging-demand table sampled to keep the fixture lightweight while preserving messy schema shape.
expected_agent_tasks: recommend aggregation before making infrastructure claims
items.license_note: Public GitHub repository associated with an open Scientific Data dataset; sampled for development.

items.why_it_matters: Faulted Tennessee Eastman chemical-process simulation workbook for process monitoring and anomaly diagnosis.
expected_agent_tasks: explain which sensor groups drive the anomaly
items.license_note: MIT-licensed GitHub repository; cite original Tennessee Eastman process references.

items.why_it_matters: Normal-operation companion workbook for the Tennessee Eastman chemical-process fault case.
expected_agent_tasks: compare sensor distributions against faulted operation
identify whether differences are operationally material
items.license_note: MIT-licensed GitHub repository; cite original Tennessee Eastman process references.

items.why_it_matters: Daily Henry Hub natural-gas spot-price spreadsheet for project economics and fuel-price sensitivity.
expected_agent_tasks: extract historical price series from legacy Excel
connect fuel-price assumptions to TEA risk
items.license_note: Public U.S. Energy Information Administration data.

items.why_it_matters: EPA material-flow and life-cycle-inventory workbook for end-of-life plastic management.
expected_agent_tasks: extract material-flow assumptions across workbook tabs
separate inventory data from scenario calculations
identify uncertain releases and missing boundary conditions
items.license_note: Public U.S. EPA GitHub repository; retain upstream provenance.

items.why_it_matters: FDA National Drug Code text files with package and product records in a compressed archive.
expected_agent_tasks: normalize drug names, dosage forms, and package records
flag why product registry data is not clinical-efficacy data
items.license_note: Public U.S. FDA data; retain source and access-date context.

items.why_it_matters: Materials-property prediction benchmark records for experimental band gap.
expected_agent_tasks: connect composition strings to property targets
distinguish benchmark predictive accuracy from validated material discovery
items.license_note: Matbench is MIT licensed; Hugging Face mirror should retain upstream citation.

items.why_it_matters: Smart small-scale steel-industry electricity consumption data with active/reactive power and load categories.
expected_agent_tasks: find operational drivers of energy intensity
separate electrical-load optimization from process-heat decarbonization claims
items.license_note: CC-BY-4.0 UCI Machine Learning Repository dataset; cite upstream authors.

items.why_it_matters: Country-level process CO2 emissions from cement production over long historical time horizons.
expected_agent_tasks: separate process emissions from fuel-combustion emissions
connect cement decarbonization claims to data boundaries
items.license_note: Zenodo dataset released under CC-BY-4.0; cite Robbie Andrew and associated ESSD publication.

items.why_it_matters: Industry-wide environmental product declaration for blended hydraulic cement.
expected_agent_tasks: extract declared-unit and GWP values from PDF tables
connect EPD assumptions to construction procurement questions
items.license_note: Public Portland Cement Association/Athena EPD PDF; retain attribution and source URL.

items.why_it_matters: Global point-source emissions catalogue including cement plants and iron/steel plants with coordinates and pollutant fields.
expected_agent_tasks: connect facility emissions to geospatial and diligence workflows
items.license_note: Zenodo open dataset; check record metadata before redistribution.
